notes: Builds CoTDeceptor (a multi-agent RL-style adversarial obfuscation framework) and evaluates it: benchmark-style evasion over 500 vulnerable samples against multiple LLM detectors and static tools, a small-vs-large model transfer experiment (ablation-like), a fine-tuned-detector dataset-augmentation experiment, and an end-to-end case study on real code agents. No human participants.
